items.title: ECB's Lagarde’s digital euro warning: Why Europe shouldn’t just copy the U.S. stablecoin model
items.summary: Lagarde warned that large stablecoins like Tether and USDC, which now dominate a $310 billion market, pose financial stability risks and could transmit stress to underlying asset markets during periods of turmoil.

items.title: Consensus panelists explain why Perp DEXes remain a tough sell for institutional investors
items.summary: Panelists at Consensus Miami said institutional investors are still largely absent from perp DEXs, citing security risks and KYC friction as key barriers.

items.title: Crypto exchanges pushed US lawmakers to bar provision on risky tokens: Report
items.summary: Three companies reportedly pressed US senators for changes to a crypto bill, removing language that would require them to offer trading on tokens “not readily susceptible to manipulation.”

items.title: Estonia's FSA issues investor warning about Zondacrypto
items.summary: The news follows an investigation into the crypto exchange by Polish law enforcement officials and reports of customer withdrawal issues.

items.title: Bitcoin’s ‘overbought’ signal flashes price top warning with focus on $78K
items.summary: Bitcoin’s 36% rally from $60,000 resulted in the relative strength index flashing a potential top signal not seen since early 2026.

items.title: Bitcoin eyes $80K reclaim as traders say these BTC price support levels must hold
items.summary: Bitcoin retagged $80,000 after falling 3% on Iran concerns, while traders flagged important BTC price support levels to preserve next.

items.title: Zcash gains 70% in a week amid growing interest in crypto privacy
items.summary: Swyftx’s Pav Hundal says Zcash is surging amid concerns about artificial intelligence, quantum computing and financial surveillance.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Judge clears path for Aave to move $71 million in ETH linked to North Korea hack
items.summary: Judge Margaret Garnett allowed frozen exploit funds on Arbitrum to move to Aave, but the legal freeze follows the assets as terrorism plaintiffs continue their claim.

items.title: US CLARITY Act sees ‘big step forward’ as markup set for May 14
items.summary: Coinbase chief policy officer Faryar Shirzad said the date is a “big step forward” and is essential for supporting innovation in the US.

items.title: Senate Banking Committee plans to hold key market structure hearing on Thursday
items.summary: The Senate Banking Committee announced it would hold its markup hearing for the Clarity Act on March 14.

items.title: Coinbase rebounds as altcoins surge with bitcoin holding above $80,000
items.summary: Tokenization and digital asset-infrastructure stocks climbed as SEC Chair Paul Atkins signaled support for onchain finance rules.

items.title: AI agents fueled a frenzy of startup building at the Consensus Miami EasyA hackathon
items.summary: Nearly 1,000 developers competed at the venue, from ecosystems like Base, Solana, and others arriving from companies like Microsoft and Google, most racing to build products around the theme of AI agents.

items.title: SEC chair Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets, AI-driven finance
items.summary: The SEC chair linked the rise of AI-powered financial systems with growing demand for blockchain-based market infrastructure and automated settlement.

items.title: Kraken parent goes for the OCC charter in bid to become a federal crypto bank
items.summary: Payward’s application would add a federally regulated trust company to the Kraken group’s existing Wyoming bank charter and Fed master account.

items.title: XRP pushes toward $1.40 as tightening range lowers breakout chances
items.summary: Price moved higher on a late volume burst, with traders watching whether compression near $1.39-$1.40 finally resolves into a larger move.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) gains 6.3%, leading index higher
items.summary: Internet Computer (ICP), up 5.8% from Thursday, was also a top performer.

items.title: Stablecoins have their 'permission slip.' Now comes the hard part.
items.summary: Executives from MoonPay, Ripple and Paxos said at Consensus Miami 2026 that regulation has accelerated stablecoin adoption, but infrastructure, privacy and distribution remain major hurdles.

items.title: Coinbase bulls point to crypto legislation and stablecoins after earnings miss
items.summary: Analysts say Coinbase’s long-term growth may depend more on stablecoins and U.S. crypto legislation than a rebound in trading activity.

items.title: U.S. added 115K jobs in April, nearly doubling expectations
items.summary: The data comes ahead of what's expected to be a new Federal Reserve chairman taking the reins at the U.S. central bank later this month.
